text: Yahoo Finance showed the Hang Seng Index at 23,924.81 at 4:08 PM GMT+8 on June 18, 2026, down 387.35 points or 1.59%, with an intraday range of 23,749.99 to 24,163.25.

market_session: Hong Kong regular-session close; Trading Economics narrative basis
text: Trading Economics reported the Hang Seng fell for a third consecutive session to its lowest since July 2025, as the Fed's hawkish tone lifted Treasury yields and the dollar; the HKMA left its base rate unchanged at 4.0%; financial, technology, retail, and energy shares led the retreat with Tencent -1.2%, Meituan -3.5%, Xiaomi -3.3%, Lenovo -4.4%, and Pop Mart -4.1%.

market_session: Asia local market closes for June 18, 2026

calculation.method: compared reported daily percent changes for Nikkei 225, KOSPI, Shanghai Composite, and Hang Seng Index

text: Among the four tracked Asia closes on June 18, 2026, two indexes were positive and two were negative; KOSPI was the strongest at +2.25% and Hang Seng was the weakest at -1.59%.
